mapper.sql: SELECT pra.*, p.title AS project_title, pr.position_name AS recruitment_position_name FROM project_recruitment_application pra LEFT JOIN project p ON pra.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN project_recruitment pr ON pra.recruitment_id = pr.id
mapper.select: WHERE pra.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pra.create_time DESC
WHERE pra.recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} ORDER BY pra.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_recruitment_application ( recruitment_id, project_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_role, desired_position, applicant_college_id, applicant_college_name, applicant_major, qualifications, answer_content, resume_url, remark, approval_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{recruitmentId}, #{projectId}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantRole}, #{desiredPosition}, #{applicantCollegeId}, #{applicantCollegeName}, #{applicantMajor}, #{qualifications}, #{answerContent}, #{resumeUrl}, #{remark}, #{approvalStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
